mapper.select: SELECT id, record_year, record_month, usage_kwh, status, locked_at, locked_by, location_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM electricity_usage_records WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, record_year, record_month, usage_kwh, status, locked_at, locked_by, location_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM electricity_usage_records WHERE record_year = #{recordYear} AND record_month = #{recordMonth} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO electricity_usage_records ( record_year, record_month, usage_kwh, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{recordYear}, #{recordMonth}, #{usageKwh}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE electricity_usage_records SET usage_kwh = #{usageKwh}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE electricity_usage_records SET status = #{status}, locked_at = #{lockedAt}, locked_by = #{lockedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
